name: Halloween Candy Reclaim
summary:
About

Grab your pickle guns, climb on top of your candy-vacuuming, self-driving chariot, and clean the village of the candy-stealing monsters which have taken control! Take back insane amounts of candy, duck the slimy stuff the monsters throw at you, and battle your way to the final boss to save Halloween!

Halloween Candy Reclaim is your perfect family-friendly, decidedly non-scary, wacky party game. It's halloweeny, full of pumpkins, ghosts, skeletons, and candy, challenging, and just plain...
